localizations.quit_game: Do you want to leave the game?
localizations.ask_auto_hidden:
Do you want to enable automatic help for hidden objects? 
This option is recommended for beginners.
localizations.hint_already_requested: You have already requested this hint!
localizations.countdown_reached_zero: The countdown has finished but time continues. You can finish the adventure.
localizations.show_more_hint: Do you want an additional hint for this card?
localizations.show_solution:
Would you like the SOLUTION for this card?
You can decide later in the "Review Hints" section.
localizations.add_result: Add this result to a Blue number.
localizations.print&play: Download the free print & play adventures from: www.spacecowboys.fr/unlock-demo
localizations.coming_soon: This story is not availaible yet!
localizations.settings_hidden_help: The “Auto” option is recommended for novice players, it will automatically show hidden objects as you go. The “Manual” mode is to be used when and if you want to ask for hidden objects yourself.
localizations.about: IMPORTANT: This is a support app for the Unlock! game. You will need the card game to understand how it works. You can download a free demo adventure from https://www.spacecowboys.fr/unlock-demos
